languages.original_text: "A dispute has arisen between Nuncius and me regarding the anatomical differences between Drukhari and Asuryani. He argues that any differences are biological in nature, while I am convinced that the environment of Commorragh is the determining factor. To settle the argument, our only hope is to analyse a live specimen."

languages.text: "У нас с Нунциусом возник спор по поводу анатомической разницы друкари и азуриани. Он утверждает, что различия спровоцированы биологическими факторами, я же уверен, что тому причиной образ жизни обитателей Комморры. Для завершения диспута необходимо произвести анализ живого образца".

languages.text: «Nuncius y yo tenemos una disputa respecto a las diferencias anatómicas entre Drukhari y Asuryani. Él propone que las diferencias son biológicas, pero yo estoy convencido de que el entorno de Commorragh es el factor determinante. Para resolver esta discusión, nuestra única opción es analizar un espécimen vivo».
languages.original_text: "A dispute has arisen between Nuncius and me regarding the anatomical differences between Drukhari and Asuryani. He argues that any differences are biological in nature, while I am convinced that the environment of Commorragh is the determining factor. To settle the argument, our only hope is to analyse a live specimen."

traits.locale_text: «Nuncius y yo tenemos una disputa respecto a las diferencias anatómicas entre Drukhari y Asuryani. Él propone que las diferencias son biológicas, pero yo estoy convencido de que el entorno de Commorragh es el factor determinante. Para resolver esta discusión, nuestra única opción es analizar un espécimen vivo».

languages.text: 「ヌンキウスと私の間で、ドルカリとアスリアーニの解剖学的差異をめぐる論争が持ち上がりました。彼はあらゆる差異が生物学的性質のものだと主張し、一方で私は、コモラの環境こそが決定的要因であると確信しています。この論争に決着をつけるには、生きた標本を分析するほか、我々に望みはありません」
languages.original_text: "A dispute has arisen between Nuncius and me regarding the anatomical differences between Drukhari and Asuryani. He argues that any differences are biological in nature, while I am convinced that the environment of Commorragh is the determining factor. To settle the argument, our only hope is to analyse a live specimen."

traits.locale_text: 「ヌンキウスと私の間で、ドルカリとアスリアーニの解剖学的差異をめぐる論争が持ち上がりました。彼はあらゆる差異が生物学的性質のものだと主張し、一方で私は、コモラの環境こそが決定的要因であると確信しています。この論争に決着をつけるには、生きた標本を分析するほか、我々に望みはありません」

languages.text: “我和努恩修斯就黑暗灵族与方舟灵族之间的解剖学差异产生了争执。他称任何差异在本质上都属于生物学范畴，而我则坚信科摩罗的环境才是决定性因素。为平息争论，我们唯一的希望就是分析一个活体样本。”
languages.original_text: "A dispute has arisen between Nuncius and me regarding the anatomical differences between Drukhari and Asuryani. He argues that any differences are biological in nature, while I am convinced that the environment of Commorragh is the determining factor. To settle the argument, our only hope is to analyse a live specimen."

traits.locale_text: “我和努恩修斯就黑暗灵族与方舟灵族之间的解剖学差异产生了争执。他称任何差异在本质上都属于生物学范畴，而我则坚信科摩罗的环境才是决定性因素。为平息争论，我们唯一的希望就是分析一个活体样本。”

languages.text: "Nuncius und ich haben einen Disput hinsichtlich der anatomischen Unterschiede zwischen Drukhari und Asuryani. Während er argumentiert, dass sämtliche Unterschiede biologischer Natur sind, bin ich überzeugt, dass die Umgebung von Commorragh der entscheidende Faktor ist. Unsere einzige Hoffnung, diesen Streit beizulegen, ist die Analyse einer Lebendprobe."
languages.original_text: "A dispute has arisen between Nuncius and me regarding the anatomical differences between Drukhari and Asuryani. He argues that any differences are biological in nature, while I am convinced that the environment of Commorragh is the determining factor. To settle the argument, our only hope is to analyse a live specimen."

traits.locale_text: "Nuncius und ich haben einen Disput hinsichtlich der anatomischen Unterschiede zwischen Drukhari und Asuryani. Während er argumentiert, dass sämtliche Unterschiede biologischer Natur sind, bin ich überzeugt, dass die Umgebung von Commorragh der entscheidende Faktor ist. Unsere einzige Hoffnung, diesen Streit beizulegen, ist die Analyse einer Lebendprobe."

languages.text: « Nuncius et moi sommes en désaccord au sujet des différences anatomiques entre les Drukharis et les Asuryanis. Selon lui, les différences sont de nature biologique ; quant à moi, je suis convaincu que l'environnement de Commorragh est un facteur déterminant. La seule manière de résoudre ce différend consiste à analyser un spécimen vivant. »
languages.original_text: "A dispute has arisen between Nuncius and me regarding the anatomical differences between Drukhari and Asuryani. He argues that any differences are biological in nature, while I am convinced that the environment of Commorragh is the determining factor. To settle the argument, our only hope is to analyse a live specimen."

traits.locale_text: « Nuncius et moi sommes en désaccord au sujet des différences anatomiques entre les Drukharis et les Asuryanis. Selon lui, les différences sont de nature biologique ; quant à moi, je suis convaincu que l'environnement de Commorragh est un facteur déterminant. La seule manière de résoudre ce différend consiste à analyser un spécimen vivant. »

languages.text: "Nuncius ile aramızda, Drukharilerle Asuryaniler arasındaki anatomik farklılıklarla ilgili bir anlaşmazlık çıktı. O farklılıkların biyolojik yapılarından kaynaklandığını savunurken ben, Commorragh ortamının belirleyici faktör olduğuna inanıyorum. Tartışmayı çözmek için tek umudumuz, canlı bir numuneyi analiz etmek."
